WELCOME TO

EDITH MANRIQUE

BEAUTY STUDIO

ABOUT.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Hello, I'm Edith Manrique, a nationally and internationally certified makeup artist passionate about enhancing every woman's unique beauty. I have experience working on makeup for Miss Guanajuato fashion shows and editorial productions. I specialize in modern makeup techniques for every occasion, always providing personalized advice and tailored services designed to help you make the best choice while making you feel more beautiful and confident.

CERTIFICATES.TITLE: 🎓 Discover My National and International Certifications & Awards
CERTIFICATES.SUBTITLE: Explore the certifications I've earned in different areas of makeup artistry. Discover my achievements!

MISSION.TITLE: Mission
MISSION.DESCRIPTION: To provide professional makeup services that enhance our clients' beauty and confidence by using high-quality products and modern techniques.

VISION.TITLE: Vision
VISION.DESCRIPTION: To be recognized as a leading makeup studio in the industry, creating unique experiences that make every client look and feel radiant.

COMMITMENT.NAME: Commitment:
COMMITMENT.DESCRIPTION: Giving our very best to exceed our clients' expectations.

CREATIVITY.NAME: Creativity:
CREATIVITY.DESCRIPTION: Continuously innovating to offer unique and modern styles.

TRUST.NAME: Trust:
TRUST.DESCRIPTION: Building relationships based on honesty and professionalism.

GALLERY.TITLE: ✨ My Work
GALLERY.SUBTITLE: Discover the artistry behind every transformation. Experience the beauty of before and after.

NAILS.TITLE: 💅 My Nail Portfolio
NAILS.SUBTITLE: Discover some of my acrylic nail designs and recent work.

LASHES.TITLE: Eyelash Extensions Portfolio
LASHES.SUBTITLE: Explore some of our eyelash extension work featuring a variety of techniques and styles, carefully designed to enhance every client's natural beauty.

HAIRSTYLES.TITLE: 💇‍♀️ Hairstyles with Different Curl Styles
HAIRSTYLES.SUBTITLE: Discover my exclusive hairstyles designed for every occasion. Beauty is all in the details.

VIDEOS.TITLE: 🎥 My Work in Video
VIDEOS.SUBTITLE: Explore some of my best makeup transformations through video. Watch the magic happen!

CONTACT.TITLE: Let's Connect!
CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: Follow me on social media to discover my latest work, updates, and more. Ready to book your appointment? Send me a message on Instagram and schedule your session with ease.

HERO.TITLE: BEAUTY SERVICES
HERO.SUBTITLE:
WELCOME TO

EDITH MANRIQUE

MAKEUP STUDIO

ABOUT.TITLE: About Our Services
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: At Edith Manrique Makeup Studio, we offer specialized beauty services designed to enhance your unique beauty. From professional makeup and hairstyles for every occasion to personalized color analysis consultations that help you discover the shades that best complement your skin tone. Let our experience help you look and feel your absolute best!

BOOKING.TITLE: Would you like to book an appointment?

SOCIAL_DAY.NAME: Daytime Social Makeup
SOCIAL_DAY.DESCRIPTION: Soft makeup in warm pink tones designed to enhance your natural beauty, perfect for everyday wear.

SOCIAL_NIGHT.NAME: Evening Social Makeup
SOCIAL_NIGHT.DESCRIPTION: Makeup with blended warm tones, luminous highlights, and a touch of shimmer to make your eyes appear larger while enhancing intensity and radiance, always respecting your skin's natural color harmony.

SMOKEY.NAME: Smokey Eyes Makeup
SMOKEY.DESCRIPTION: Smokey makeup in rich brown and dark shades with a touch of colorful glitter, designed to create a deep, bold, and captivating look.

MATURE.NAME: Mature Skin Makeup with Thread Lifting
MATURE.DESCRIPTION: Illuminating makeup with soft blended tones that enhances natural beauty without emphasizing expression lines. Thread lifting may also be applied to help reduce the appearance of wrinkles, improve skin texture, and provide additional support.

XV.NAME: Quinceañera Makeup
XV.DESCRIPTION: Customized makeup in neutral or glamorous tones with color, shimmer, and eyeliner, designed to enhance the quinceañera's natural beauty while maintaining a fresh, youthful appearance.

BRIDAL_DAY.NAME: Daytime Bridal Makeup
BRIDAL_DAY.DESCRIPTION: Elegant and radiant bridal makeup featuring neutral, beige, brown, and pink tones, tailored to the bride's personal style and the type of ceremony.

BRIDAL_NIGHT.NAME: Evening Bridal Makeup
BRIDAL_NIGHT.DESCRIPTION: Elegant and sophisticated bridal makeup with neutral tones, satin finishes, and shimmering eyeshadows, designed to enhance the bride's features for evening ceremonies.

FULL_COLOR.NAME: Full Color Makeup
FULL_COLOR.DESCRIPTION: Vibrant and colorful makeup for special events, photoshoots, or everyday wear, focusing on enhancing the lips and eyes to create a fresh, radiant look.

EDITORIAL.NAME: Editorial Makeup
EDITORIAL.DESCRIPTION: Creative makeup inspired by fashion and artistic concepts, featuring graphic eyeliner, bold colors, glitter, and unique designs. Perfect for magazines, advertising campaigns, runway shows, and social media content, always tailored to the client's or agency's vision.

HERO.TITLE: NAIL SERVICES
HERO.SUBTITLE:
WELCOME TO

EDITH MANRIQUE

NAIL STUDIO

ABOUT.TITLE: About Our Services
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: At Edith Manrique Nail Studio, we offer acrylic nail services designed to enhance your style and personality. We use high-quality products and pay close attention to every detail to provide elegant, durable, and fully personalized results.

BOOKING.TITLE: Would you like to book an appointment?

ROUND.NAME: Round Acrylic Nails
ROUND.DESCRIPTION: A classic design with soft, rounded edges, perfect for those looking for comfort and timeless elegance.

SQUARE.NAME: Square Acrylic Nails
SQUARE.DESCRIPTION: A modern shape with straight edges that creates a clean and sophisticated look, ideal for bold nail designs.

OVAL.NAME: Oval Acrylic Nails
OVAL.DESCRIPTION: A delicate and feminine style that visually elongates the fingers while maintaining a natural appearance.

SQUOVAL.NAME: Squoval Acrylic Nails
SQUOVAL.DESCRIPTION: A combination of square and oval shapes, offering the perfect balance of elegance, durability, and comfort.

ALMOND.NAME: Almond Acrylic Nails
ALMOND.DESCRIPTION: An elegant shape that visually lengthens the fingers and provides a stylish, modern finish.

STILETTO.NAME: Stiletto Acrylic Nails
STILETTO.DESCRIPTION: A bold, pointed nail shape ideal for those who want a glamorous and eye-catching style.

BALLERINA.NAME: Ballerina Acrylic Nails
BALLERINA.DESCRIPTION: Also known as Coffin Nails, this trendy shape features a tapered design with a flat tip for a sleek and sophisticated look.

SEMIPERMANENT_GEL.NAME: Semi-Permanent Gel
SEMIPERMANENT_GEL.DESCRIPTION: A gel polish technique that provides a glossy, long-lasting finish. Recommended for strong natural nails, with a durability of approximately 15 to 21 days depending on nail care and natural nail growth.

HERO.TITLE: EYELASH EXTENSIONS
HERO.SUBTITLE:
WELCOME TO

EDITH MANRIQUE

BEAUTY STUDIO

ABOUT.TITLE: About Our Services
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: At Edith Manrique Beauty Studio, we offer personalized eyelash extensions designed to enhance your natural beauty. We use professional techniques and high-quality materials to provide comfortable, safe, and long-lasting results tailored to your style.

GUIDE.TITLE: Lash Style Guide
GUIDE.DESCRIPTION: Learn about the differences between each eyelash extension style and discover which one best suits your desired look.

BOOKING.TITLE: Would you like to book an appointment?

CLASSIC_1X.NAME: Classic 1x / Natural
CLASSIC_1X.DESCRIPTION: One extension is applied to each natural lash, creating a soft, elegant, and natural-looking result.

HYBRID.NAME: Hybrid
HYBRID.DESCRIPTION: A combination of classic and volume techniques for added texture, fullness, and definition.

VOLUME_3D.NAME: 3D Volume
VOLUME_3D.DESCRIPTION: Application of 3D fans to create fuller lashes while maintaining a lightweight and comfortable feel.

HAWAIIAN_VOLUME.NAME: Hawaiian Volume
HAWAIIAN_VOLUME.DESCRIPTION: A soft and fluffy volume technique that provides a glamorous yet natural-looking finish.

MEGA_VOLUME.NAME: Mega Volume
MEGA_VOLUME.DESCRIPTION: Perfect for clients seeking an intense, bold look with maximum lash density.

VOLUME_WISPY.NAME: Volume / Wispy
VOLUME_WISPY.DESCRIPTION: A trendy wispy style that combines different lash lengths for a textured and dimensional look.

CLASSIC_MASCARA.NAME: Classic / Mascara Effect
CLASSIC_MASCARA.DESCRIPTION: Creates the appearance of wearing mascara, giving lashes extra definition and fullness.

NATURAL_CLASSIC.NAME: Natural Classic
NATURAL_CLASSIC.DESCRIPTION: A subtle classic style that enhances your natural lashes with a soft and elegant finish.

MEGA_HAWAIIAN.NAME: Mega Volume / Hawaiian
MEGA_HAWAIIAN.DESCRIPTION: A combination of mega volume and the Hawaiian effect to create a bold, lightweight, and multidimensional look.
